notes:
Getting it to run:
The game starts and runs without any tweaks or changes.

Stability:
I encountered multiple crashes, but those happen on windows too (for example: https://steamcommunity.com/app/378360/discussions/0/3454730619124917604/).
I ended up refunding the game as the frequent crashes while switching from local to world map were making it impossible to play.

Performance:
Unfortunately I did not try the game  on Windows for an FPS comparison but you get 60 fps while you're decently zoomed in. Zooming out completely will drop the fps to ~15-20.

While you do not need 60 fps to play and enjoy the game, as it's not a twitch shooter, there are concerns about the performance later in the game as your city grows and expands. At that point the game would probably drop into the single digits and become unplayable.
title: Ymir

notes: Game doesn't run since release of the Subjugation update, which introduced some anti-cheating measures. A black window opens up and then closes. Game ran perfectly prior to it, 125 hours of play time. Very unfortunate.
title: Ymir

title: Ymir

notes:
Game runs perfectly on Linux, however the game uses a extension by default that makes it crash because this extension is poorly coded but unfortunately needed for some Windows players. The developer has added the -noshell2 launch parameter to bypass this extension being used on Linux (You won't need it!) after this the game launches and plays perfectly.

In short: add -noshell2 in the launch parameters and you are good to go.
title: Ymir

notes:
Runs exactly the same as the Windows version. (including crashes at the same points)


Game needs -noshell2 launch option to work, it was directly implemented by the developer so that proton works.
title: Ymir
